title: Saplings+
description: Sapling+ allows dropped tree saplings to automatically plant themselves when dropped, providing natural reforestation in a lightweight, server-side Fabric mod.
body:
Sapling+ is a lightweight, vanilla-friendly Fabric mod that allows dropped tree saplings to naturally replant themselves.

When a sapling item lands on valid soil such as dirt or grass, it has a chance to plant itself after settling. This creates a more natural feeling world where forests can slowly regrow without player intervention.

Sapling+ is designed to be extremely performance-friendly. It runs entirely server-side, tracks only sapling items, and does not interfere with vanilla mechanics or other mods. Clients do not need to install the mod to join a server using it.

Features:

Automatic replanting of dropped tree saplings

Server-side only (works in single-player and multiplayer)

Extremely lightweight with no performance impact

No mixins, configs, or intrusive changes

Supports all vanilla tree saplings (excluding azalea and mangrove)

Requirements:

Fabric Loader

Fabric API

Minecraft 1.21.11
